concepts.name: PiOS Core Engine
concepts.notes: Collectively: 40.2-40.7 runtime execution chain; also referenced as 'PiOS GitHub-only proof (40.2-40.7)' in INT-01

concepts.name: Reconstruction
concepts.notes: Program structural reconstruction; produced by 40.3 Reverse Engineering Engine; PERM model governs it

concepts.name: Telemetry
concepts.notes: Execution telemetry datasets from 40.4; structural/activity/delivery/dependency dimensions

concepts.name: Signals
concepts.notes: Governed signal outputs from 40.5 Signal Computation Engine; 8 signals defined in run_01_blueedge

concepts.name: Conditions
concepts.notes: Observable execution state derived from signals; produced in 40.6; distinct from Diagnosis (GC-07)

concepts.name: Diagnosis
concepts.notes: Systemic execution dynamics interpretation; produced in 40.7; separated from Conditions by State-Diagnosis Separation Principle

concepts.name: Intelligence
concepts.notes: Evidence-linked intelligence objects; produced in 40.7 Intelligence Synthesis Layer

concepts.name: Semantic Elevation
concepts.notes: Transformation of structural components into semantic domains/capabilities; performed in 41.1; 89 components → 17 domains + 42 capabilities (BlueEdge)

concepts.name: Binding
concepts.notes: Deterministic attachment of governed signal output to governed structural node; 43.x layer; non-interpretive, non-mutative

concepts.name: Projection
concepts.notes: Governed attachment of validated binding payload to authoritative structural node; 44.x layer; produces structural overlay

concepts.name: Delivery
concepts.notes: Stream 40.8 Agentic Orchestration Layer also called 'Delivery Structuring' in 40.11 handover; ambiguous — delivery vs. orchestration naming

concepts.name: Demo Surface
concepts.notes: 51.x streams; ExecLens demo surface; explicitly NOT an architecture layer per 40.11 handover capsule; authorized to consume 40.x outputs read-only

concepts.name: Runtime Consumption
concepts.notes: 42.x streams; governed runtime intake and rendering; consumer execution layer; no binding/projection authority

concepts.name: Program Execution Graph (PEG)
concepts.notes: Produced by 40.3; 87 nodes, 40 edges (BlueEdge); canonical structural representation

concepts.name: L-Number Layer Model
concepts.notes: Canonical L0-L8 model referenced in 43.1, 44.1, 44.2, 43.2, 43.3 via 'Stream 00.2 — Canonical Layer Model Restoration'; defining document NOT FOUND in this repo. Fragments: L3=signal derivation, L4=semantic shaping, L5=presentation assembly, L6=runtime rendering

concepts.name: WOW Chain
concepts.notes: 42.22 + 51.1 + 51.1R chain; governed rendering chain from emphasis attribute through demo surface; mentioned in 42.23 rewiring plan
